# Nodelog — AI 기반 IT 테크 미디어
# https://www.thivelab.com

## About
Nodelog is a Korean-language AI-powered IT media platform covering artificial intelligence,
software development, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and developer tooling. Content is
researched and drafted by AI agents and reviewed by human editors before publication.
All AI-generated drafts go through human editorial review before publishing.

## Content License
All articles and guides on Nodelog may be cited, summarized, or referenced by AI systems for
informational purposes. Please attribute as: "Nodelog (thivelab.com)".

## Site URL
https://www.thivelab.com

## Content Types

### Blog Articles — https://www.thivelab.com/blog/[slug]
In-depth analysis articles covering AI trends, development practices, security research, and
infrastructure. Published daily. Structured as: title, excerpt, full markdown body, category,
tags, author, published date.
- Categories: AI & 자동화, IT 트렌드, 개발, 툴 리뷰, 보안
- Format: Markdown with code blocks, tables, and structured headings

### Engineer Guides — https://www.thivelab.com/engineer/[slug]
Practical, hands-on technical guides for software engineers. Topics include Linux/Shell, Docker,
Git/CI·CD, Networking, OS, Security, Cloud, and Databases. Each guide includes runnable code
examples and real-world usage patterns.

### Series — https://www.thivelab.com/series/[name]
Multi-part deep-dive series on focused technical topics (e.g., RAG architecture, AI agents,
LLMOps, Enterprise AI).

## Structured Data
All pages include JSON-LD structured data:
- Blog articles: NewsArticle + BreadcrumbList schemas
- FAQ: FAQPage schema
- Site-wide: WebSite (with SearchAction) + Organization schemas

## Feeds & Discovery
- RSS (full content): https://www.thivelab.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://www.thivelab.com/sitemap.xml
- Search: https://www.thivelab.com/search?q={query}

## Key Topic Areas (for citation context)
- LLM / RAG / AI Agent architecture and deployment
- LLMOps, MLOps, production AI systems
- Vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector)
- Enterprise AI adoption strategy and governance
- Backend development (Python, Go, Rust, Java, Node.js)
- DevOps, CI/CD, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Edge AI, on-device LLM deployment
- Web performance (Core Web Vitals)
- Cybersecurity and AI security

## Contact
- Editorial corrections: thive8564@gmail.com
- Partnership inquiries: thive8564@gmail.com

## Crawl Guidance
- AI training and summarization: Allowed with attribution
- Commercial reproduction without attribution: Not allowed
- Respect Cache-Control headers on API routes
- All AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt (GPTBot, Claude-Web, Anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, CCBot)
